creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
Carlos,
Please address the additional QA shown with DEVELOPER=yes:
WARN: /usr/ports/multimedia/mpv/pkg-plist: [12]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
WARN: /usr/ports/multimedia/mpv/pkg-plist: [13]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate
WARN: /usr/ports/multimedia/mpv/pkg-plist: [14]: installing icons, please define INSTALLS_ICONS as appropriate

Also present a commit message for review and I'll provide mentor approval if everything looks satisfactory.
